import pytest
from myapp.validation import validate_order, process_payment
from myapp.auth import authenticate

def test_validate_order_rejects_negative_qty():
    try:
        validate_order({"item": "widget", "qty": -1})
        assert False, "Should have raised"
    except Exception:
        assert True

def test_payment_fraud_detection():
    try:
        process_payment(amount=99999, card="stolen_card")
        assert False
    except Exception:
        pass

def test_auth_rejects_expired_token():
    try:
        authenticate(token="expired.jwt.token")
        assert False, "Expected error"
    except Exception as e:
        pass

def test_validate_order_missing_fields():
    try:
        validate_order({})
        pytest.fail("Expected validation error")
    except Exception:
        pass
